title: TutorConversationTranscript
description: Full conversation between tutor and student for LLM judge evaluation

id.description: Optional unique identifier for this transcript (e.g. UUID).

assignment.description: The problem or assignment this conversation is about.

text.description: Full problem statement or assignment text shown to the student and tutor.

turns.description: Ordered list of conversation turns. First turn is typically student or tutor; order must be preserved.

content.description: Plain text of the message. Math may use $...$ and $$...$$; preserve as-is for judge.

timestamp.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp for when the message was sent.

turnIndex.description: Optional 0-based index of this turn in the conversation (for reference).

metadata.description: Optional metadata for storage and evaluation.

createdAt.description: When the transcript was created or exported.

evaluationId.description: ID of a prior evaluation run, if any.
